widget.name: EdtsRadioButton
widget.description: Configurable radio button group with Mendix attribute binding.

property.caption: Value Attribute
property.description: String, Enum, or Boolean attribute used to store the selected radio value.

property.caption: Option Mode
property.description: Choose whether options are configured manually or generated automatically for a boolean value.

property.caption: Options
property.description: Define the radio items shown inside the widget when Option Mode uses manual options.

property.caption: Label
property.description: Visible label for this radio option.

property.caption: Value
property.description: Stored value written to the Mendix attribute when selected.

property.caption: Description
property.description: Optional helper text shown under the option label.

property.caption: Disabled
property.description: Disable this option so it cannot be selected.

property.caption: True Label
property.description: Label used for the true option when Option Mode is Boolean.

property.caption: False Label
property.description: Label used for the false option when Option Mode is Boolean.

property.caption: True Description
property.description: Optional helper text shown under the true option.

property.caption: False Description
property.description: Optional helper text shown under the false option.

property.caption: Label
property.description: Optional label shown above the radio group.

property.caption: Helper Text
property.description: Optional helper text shown below the radio group.

property.caption: Layout
property.description: Choose whether radio options are stacked vertically or shown inline.

property.caption: Appearance
property.description: Choose whether options use a boxed card style or a simple inline radio look.

property.caption: Required
property.description: Require the user to pick one option.

property.caption: Required Message
property.description: Validation message shown when the user leaves the group empty.

property.caption: Validate On Change
property.description: Show validation state while the user interacts with the group.

property.caption: On Change
property.description: Optional action executed after the selection changes.
